author.occupation: GTM Recruiter for High-Growth SaaS | Sales • Marketing • RevOps

text:
Pitched Supersonik on the IESE Business School stage yesterday. Still buzzing.

Five minutes.
Hundreds of MBA students.
One mission: show them how we're rewriting how software gets sold.

Software sales hasn't changed in decades. You still need a human rep to schedule a call and run the whole demo. Slow, expensive, doesn't scale.

Supersonik fixes that. Our AI agents run live, personalized product demos 24/7, in any language, for any lead, with zero human involvement.

I was so impressed by the conversations with student at IESE - so many smart, hungry people ready to build the future of AI-powered GTM.

Due to growing demand, weplan 4x our headcount this year.

We're looking for talents to join our GTM Team in Barcelona. Someone proactive, curious, and resourceful. Someone who wants to sit at the intersection of AI, sales, and product, and ship real impact every week.

If that's you (or someone you know), apply through our LinkedIn, or reach out at hiring@supersonik.ai or Dale Boltaev.

Try the demo yourself at supersonik.ai. You'll get it in two minutes.

Huge thanks to IESE Business School and the Startup Career Fair team for having us. Let's keep building.

#AI #Startups #Hiring #Barcelona #IESE
